title: The Knowledge Hub (Library)
description: Our library houses over 50,000 volumes, digital archives, and quiet study zones. It's the heart of academic research at Anna Adarsh.

title: Innovation Labs
description: State-of-the-art computer and science labs equipped with the latest technology to foster practical learning and research.

title: Main Auditorium
description: A grand space with 1000+ seating capacity, hosting international conferences, cultural fests, and guest lectures.

title: Sports Complex
description: Promoting physical well-being with professional-grade courts for basketball, volleyball, and a dedicated indoor sports arena.
